title: Promote official WNBA mobile data to primary model source
evidence: Official player logs/team dash/player dash are ready. Rows: game=6, team=17, player=337.
recommended_change: Use official_mobile_playergamelogs_v21, official_mobile_team_dash_base_v21, and official_mobile_player_dash_base_v21 as primary feature inputs before SportsDataverse fallback.
safety_gate: Safe: read-only feature input promotion; no formula change until backtest.

title: Separate model signal quality from execution fill quality
recommended_change: Keep two scorecards: model recommended line/edge and actual execution fill/CLV. Do not let multiple fills of one signal distort model hit rate.

title: Keep Hermes in manual approval during model upgrade
recommended_change: Maintain MANUAL_APPROVAL_REQUIRED and MODEL_SAMPLE_LOCK until V21 backtest demonstrates stable improvement.
safety_gate: Required: no auto-betting or threshold changes.

title: Add market consensus and line-shopping range to model context
evidence: market_features_v21 has 6 events. Average total range=0.75.
recommended_change: Add market_total_median, market_total_range, and market_total_books as non-predictive context gates: avoid overreacting when book range is wide; prioritize best available line versus consensus.
safety_gate: Safe: context/gating only; do not alter projected total directly until measured.

title: Introduce V21 feature audit before changing projected total formula
evidence: game_model_features_v21 has 6 games; usable projection/line edge rows=6; avg abs edge=3.4933333333333336.
recommended_change: Run a correlation/backtest layer that compares projection_minus_line against result, CLV, and execution P/L before applying any formula weights.
safety_gate: Gate: no formula change until backtest sample is large enough and audit improves.

title: Add team form and rotation pressure layer
recommended_change: Create a team environment score using recent playerlog_team_pts_l5, dash_pts, starter_minutes_concentration, bench_minutes_share, and DREB allowed blend. Use as an adjustment candidate, not live formula yet.
safety_gate: Gate: compare against closing totals and results for at least 30-50 games before live weight.

title: Use player concentration for totals and future props
recommended_change: Build team concentration features: top scorer dependency, starter minutes concentration, and bench share. For props, require player market data plus settlement readiness.
safety_gate: Gate: player props remain manual/research until --props returns live market rows.

title: Promote blended DREB allowed as first validated matchup feature
evidence: DREB allowed blend exists for 15 teams; range=23.53246753246753-27.02626262626263.
recommended_change: Use blended DREB allowed as a matchup pressure feature for rebound props and totals environment. Keep weight advisory until historical validation.
safety_gate: Gate: validate against player rebound prop outcomes before auto-use.
